mapper.insert:
insert into shebao_payment_plan_detail (plan_id, determination_id, determination_item_id, subsidy_type, street_name, village_name, person_name, id_card_no, business_period, payment_month, distribution_amount, grant_org, account_name, bank_account, relation_to_insured, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark) values
(#{item.planId}, #{item.determinationId}, #{item.determinationItemId}, #{item.subsidyType}, #{item.streetName}, #{item.villageName}, #{item.personName}, #{item.idCardNo}, #{item.businessPeriod}, #{item.paymentMonth}, #{item.distributionAmount}, #{item.grantOrg}, #{item.accountName}, #{item.bankAccount}, #{item.relationToInsured}, #{item.delFlag}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.remark})
mapper.select: select d.id, d.plan_id, d.determination_id, d.determination_item_id, d.subsidy_type, d.street_name, d.village_name, d.person_name, d.id_card_no, date_format(d.business_period, '%Y-%m') as business_period, d.payment_month, d.distribution_amount, d.grant_org, d.account_name, d.bank_account, d.relation_to_insured from shebao_payment_plan_detail d where d.plan_id = #{planId} and d.del_flag = '0' order by d.id asc

select null as id, null as plan_id, bd.id as determination_id, bdi.id as determination_item_id, bdi.subsidy_type, sso.street_name, svc.village_name, sp.name as person_name, coalesce(bd.id_card_no, sp.id_card_no) as id_card_no, date_format(#{businessPeriod}, '%Y-%m') as business_period, case when bdi.benefit_start_year is not null and bdi.benefit_start_month is not null then concat(bdi.benefit_start_year, '-', lpad(bdi.benefit_start_month, 2, '0')) else null end as payment_month, ifnull(bdi.subsidy_standard, 0) as distribution_amount, bd.grant_org, bd.account_name, bd.bank_account, bd.relation_to_insured from benefit_determination_item bdi left join benefit_determination bd on bdi.determination_id = bd.id left join shebao_subsidy_person sp on bd.subsidy_person_id = sp.id left join shebao_street_office sso on sp.street_office_id = sso.id left join shebao_village_committee svc on sp.village_committee_id = svc.id where bd.del_flag = '0' and bdi.del_flag = '0' and bd.approval_status = 'approved' and ifnull(bdi.benefit_status, '0') = '0' and not exists ( select 1 from shebao_payment_plan_detail pd left join shebao_payment_plan pp on pd.plan_id = pp.id and pp.del_flag = '0' where pd.determination_item_id = bdi.id and pd.business_period = #{businessPeriod} and pd.del_flag = '0' ) order by bdi.id asc
